reasoning_summary: This is a partially equipped modern kitchen with key cooking affordances present but lacking a stove, oven, or microwave. The work triangle is defined, countertop prep space is generous, and both water access and storage are well-provisioned. This space scores 3 â€” marginally adequate for daily cooking at any skill level.
